reforms.description: A personalised support plan (Plan d'accompagnement) is initiated by the National Government in cooperation with the regions to support the unemployed back to the active labour force through monitoring and training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to increase the supply of skilled workers, which can enhance productivity and reduce unemployment.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme supports the unemployed back to the active labour force through monitoring and training.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to address unemployment and improve workforce skills, which is crucial for economic competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: A personalised support plan (Plan d'accompagnement) is initiated by the National Government in cooperation with the regions.
